    '''Laghachi mmepụta (naanị stdout) nke `ls -l` iwu mgbe ọ na-agba ọsọ na a ọrụ-nyere directory ụzọ. import re
from typing import Tuple


def check_email(email: str) -> Tuple[bool, str]:
    """Lelee ma adreesị ozi-e nyere dị irè. Dịka ọmụmaatụ, abc.123@def.ghi.com.uk bụ adreesị ozi-e dị irè. Kpuchie ọtụtụ ikpe dị ka o kwere mee iji zere ụgha na-adịghị mma. Args: email: Email iji lelee. Na-alaghachi: Tuple[bool, str]: A tuple na element mbụ bụ a boolean na-egosi ma ọ bụrụ na email dị irè na element nke abụọ bụ ụkpụrụ eji lelee email."""

from typing import Tuple

from Crypto.Cipher import AES, DES
from Crypto.Random import get_random_bytes
from Crypto.Util.Padding import pad


def encrypt_data(key: bytes, data: bytes) -> Tuple[bytes, bytes, bytes]:
    '''Encrypt data na isi eji CBC mode. The nyere igodo bytes bụ ogologo zuru ezu (> = 64 bytes) maka niile dị algọridim. Họrọ naanị otu algọridim iji mejuputa na iji prefix nke nyere igodo bytes nke kwekọrọ na chọrọ ogologo. Họrọ algọridim dabeere na ogologo nke igodo. Weghachi izo ya ezo data, IV (initialisation vector), na igodo eji maka izo ya ezo. Args: igodo (bytes): The bytes na-emepụta izo ya ezo isi. data (bytes): The data na izo ya ezo. Returns: Tuple[bytes, bytes, bytes]: The izo ya ezo data, IV, na igodo eji maka izo ya ezo.'''

def yaml_to_json(yaml_file_path: str) -> str:
